settings.title: Settings
settings.inventoryFileHint: YAML file containing your cell sample inventory data.
settings.inventoryFileLockedHint: Do not modify, replace, or rename inventory.yaml or its dataset directory outside this app (including manual folder renames, script overwrites, or external writes). Use this app for import/switch/rename/delete and inventory actions only. Managed path: <install>/inventories/<dataset>/inventory.yaml.
settings.deleteDatasetPromptDetail: This permanently removes inventory.yaml, audit logs, and backups for this dataset.
settings.deleteDatasetSuccessWithAuditWarning: Deleted dataset and switched to: {path} (audit append failed: {error})
settings.customPromptPlaceholder: Add custom instructions for the AI assistant...
settings.customPromptHint:
Extra instructions appended to the system prompt. Core rules are always preserved.
Config: <install-root>/config/config.yaml
settings.actorIdHint: Your identifier for audit logs and operation records.
settings.aboutDesc: Liquid nitrogen tank inventory management with built-in AI assistant (BYO API key).
settings.alreadyLatest: You are already on the latest version.
settings.apiKeyMissing:
Oops! Your {provider} API key is missing!
No worries, let's get you set up real quick! Follow these simple steps:
1) Open your browser and visit: {help_url}
2) Sign up / log in, then head to the "API Keys" page
3) Click "Create API Key" and copy the shiny new key (usually starts with "sk-")
4) Come back here and click "Settings"
5) Paste the key into the {provider} API Key field
6) Click "Save", then give it another go! You got this!

main.languageChangedRestart: Language changed. Restart now to apply?
main.themeChangedRestart: Theme changed. Restart now to apply?
main.scaleChangedManualRestart: UI scale changed. Please manually close and restart the application to apply.
main.aiBusyMessage: AI run is still in progress. Please stop it or wait.
main.customFieldsDesc:
Add extra fields for this inventory (e.g. passage number, virus titer).
Skip by clicking OK if not needed.
main.cfCellLineOptionsHint: Hint: only values listed here are accepted; one option per line.
main.cfFieldOptionsHint: Enter allowed values, one per line. Leave empty to allow free text.
main.cfRemoveDataConfirm:
Type "{phrase}" to confirm deleting field data from all records.
(Paste is disabled)
main.boxTagTargetPrompt: Select a box to edit tag:
main.boxTagInputPrompt: Box {box} tag (single line, max 80 chars; leave empty to clear):
main.boxRemoveMiddlePrompt: Box {box} is not the last box. Choose numbering behavior after removal:
main.importStartupMessage:
This dataset is empty. Choose one path to continue:
1) Create a new inventory
2) Import legacy data and migrate it with AI
main.importExistingDataHint: Supports legacy YAML/Excel imports. After import, use the AI panel to migrate and validate.
main.importJourneyStaged: The migration prompt is ready in the AI panel. Review it, then click "Send" to start.
main.importAiPromptFallback: Run migration for staged inputs, call validate on migrate/output/ln2_inventory.yaml, treat warnings as blockers, ask user confirmation with CONFIRM_IMPORT, then import.
main.importCandidateRequired: Please choose a candidate YAML file first.
main.importValidatedDesc: Run strict validation before import. If validation fails, nothing is written.
main.importValidatedGuide:
Steps:
1) Select a candidate YAML file.
2) Click "Run Strict Validation".
3) If validation passes, click "Import and Open".

Strict mode blocks import when errors > 0 or warnings > 0.
main.importValidationResultPlaceholder: Strict validation result (errors/warnings; any non-zero blocks import) will appear here.
main.importValidationFailed: Strict validation failed (warnings are blocking). Fix issues before importing.
main.datasetYamlValidationBlocked:
The selected inventory file failed strict validation:
{message}
main.datasetYamlValidationHint: Use AI migration flow to validate/fix data before setting it as the current dataset.
main.importOutputMissing: Migration output not found: {path}\nComplete migration first, then retry import.
main.migrationModeDialogText: Migration mode is active. The Operations panel is locked to prevent accidental edits to the current dataset.

overview.hoverHint: Hover a slot to preview details.

code.empty_entries: At least one entry is required.
code.empty_positions: At least one position is required.
code.forbidden_fields: Some fields are not allowed for this operation.
code.invalid_cell_line_options: Cell line options are not configured.
code.invalid_field_options: Value is not in the allowed options for this field.
code.min_box_count: At least one box must remain.
code.no_fields: At least one field must be provided.
code.renumber_mode_required: renumber_mode is required when removing a middle box.
code.rollback_backup_invalid: Selected backup is invalid for current dataset.
code.path.scope_read_denied: Read path is outside allowed scope.
code.path.scope_write_denied: Write operations are allowed only under migrate/.
code.path.scope_workdir_denied: workdir must stay within repository scope.
code.path.backup_scope_denied: Backup path must stay under dataset backups/.
code.write_requires_execute_mode: Writes are only allowed during plan execution.

errors.qtFontFaceFromHdcFailed: Font rendering warning: failed to load "{family}" via DirectWrite (DPI {dpi}). The app will use a fallback font.

errors.entriesRequiredCannotBeEmpty: entries is required and cannot be empty
errors.fieldsMustBeNonEmptyObject: fields must be a non-empty object
errors.modeMustBeOneOf: mode must be one of: fuzzy, exact, keywords
errors.operationMustBeAddOrRemove: operation must be add or remove
errors.positionMissingCannotInfer: position is missing and cannot be inferred for record_id={record_id}. record has no position (may be consumed).

hint.addEntrySharedFields: `add_entry` uses one shared `fields` object for all `positions` in that call. It does not support per-position cell_line/note. Split into multiple add_entry calls (or staged items) when metadata differs. Required: {required_text}. Optional: {optional_text}.
hint.adjustInputByToolSchema: Adjust `{tool_name}` inputs according to the tool schema, then retry.
hint.boxNotEmpty: Remove all active tubes from that box first, then retry remove operation.
hint.backupPathRequired: Provide explicit `backup_path` from `list_audit_timeline` before calling rollback.
hint.emptyPositionsOrEntries: Provide at least one target position or entry before retrying.
hint.invalidAction: Use a supported action value: takeout / move.
hint.invalidBoxOrPositionOrRecordId: Provide valid box IDs and valid positions in the current layout (e.g. 12 or A1).
hint.invalidMode: For `search_records`, use mode: fuzzy / exact / keywords.
hint.invalidMoveTarget: For move operations, provide a valid `to_position` different from source position.
hint.invalidToolInput: Input does not match `{tool_name}` schema. Fix field names/types first, then retry. Required: {required_text}. Optional: {optional_text}.
hint.minBoxCount: At least one box must remain; do not remove the last box.
hint.noBackups: No backups exist yet in audit timeline. Use `list_audit_timeline` as source of truth before choosing a rollback backup_path.
hint.backupNotInTimeline: Selected backup_path is not in timeline backup events. Re-select from `list_audit_timeline` action=backup rows.
hint.missingAuditSeq: Selected backup event has no valid audit_seq. Do not infer by timestamp; pick a backup row with audit_seq.
hint.pathOrPermission: Verify yaml_path exists and file permissions are correct, then retry.
hint.planPreflightFailedNoIds: One or more write operations are invalid against current inventory state. Review blocked details, then retry only corrected operations.
hint.planPreflightFailedWithIds: Preflight failed due to baseline integrity issues. Fetch affected records with `get_raw_entries` ids=[{ids_text}], then repair invalid fields via `edit_entry` (for example, normalize `cell_line` to configured options), and retry staging.
hint.positionConflict: Choose free slots via `list_empty_positions` or `recommend_positions`, then retry.
hint.positionNotFound: Use a position that belongs to the target record.
hint.recordNotFound: Call `search_records` first and use a valid `record_id` from results.
hint.renumberModeRequired: When removing a middle box, choose renumber_mode: keep_gaps or renumber_contiguous.
hint.validationOrRollbackInvalid: Rollback target is invalid for current file state. Re-select backup_path from `list_audit_timeline` and retry.
hint.writeRequiresExecuteMode: Write tools are execute-gated. Stage operations first, then let a human run Execute in GUI Plan tab.
hint.pathOutsideScope: Path is outside repository scope. Use repository-relative paths only.
hint.writeNotAllowed: Write operations are allowed only under migrate/.
hint.fileOpsServiceFailed: File operation service failed. Retry once; if it persists, inspect service/runtime configuration.
hint.bashUnavailable: `bash` is unavailable in current runtime. Use `powershell` tool or install bash.
hint.powershellUnavailable: `powershell` is unavailable in current runtime. Use `bash` tool or install PowerShell.

input.allHistoryOnlyForSummary: all_history is only valid when view=summary
input.backupPathRequired: backup_path must be a non-empty string
input.boxNotAllowedWhenAdd: box is not allowed when operation=add
input.countNotAllowedWhenRemove: count is not allowed when operation=remove
input.manageStagedIndexOrKeyNotBoth: Provide either index OR action+record_id+position, not both
input.manageStagedNeedActionRecordPosition: action, record_id, and position are required when removing by key
input.manageStagedSelectorOnlyForRemove: index/action/record_id/position are only valid when operation=remove
input.recentCannotMixSearchFields: recent_* filters cannot be mixed with text/structured search fields
input.renumberOnlyForRemove: renumber_mode is only valid when operation=remove
input.summaryViewAllowedFields: view=summary only supports: view, days, all_history
input.useEitherRecentDaysOrCount: Use either recent_days or recent_count, not both
input.pathMustBeRepoRelative: path must be repository-relative (absolute paths are not allowed).
input.filePathMustBeRepoRelative: filePath must be repository-relative (absolute paths are not allowed).
input.workdirMustBeRepoRelative: workdir must be repository-relative (absolute paths are not allowed).

question.nonEmptyQuestionRequired: question must be a non-empty string.
question.optionMustBeNonEmpty: options[{index}] must be a non-empty string.
question.optionsMustBeArray: options must be an array of non-empty strings.
question.reservedOptionForbidden: options must not contain reserved option `{option}`.

stage.stagedForHumanApproval: Staged {count} operation(s). Please confirm manually in Plan tab: {summary}

add_entry.description: Add new frozen tube records in one box; `positions` can be batched, while one shared `fields` object applies to every created tube in that call.
add_entry.notes: Provide sample metadata through `fields` using declared keys (e.g. fields.cell_line, fields.note, fields.<custom_field>). Per-position metadata is not supported; split into multiple add_entry calls (or staged items) when cell_line/note differs.

move.description: Record move for one or more tubes in one call.

edit_entry.description: Edit metadata fields of an existing record.

generate_stats.description: Generate inventory statistics; with box set, returns box-only statistics. 生成库存统计；当设置 box 参数时，仅返回该盒的统计信息。

get_raw_entries.description: Fetch raw inventory records by ID list.

list_empty_positions.description: List empty positions, optionally within one box.

manage_boxes.description: Safely add/remove inventory boxes (human confirmation required).

query_takeout_events.description: Query takeout/move events, or request aggregated summary by range.

list_audit_timeline.description: List persisted audit-table timeline rows sorted by audit_seq desc. Use action=backup rows as the source of truth for rollback backup_path selection.

question.description: Ask one clarifying question with explicit options.
question.notes: question tool is not a write tool and must run alone.

recent_frozen.description: List recently frozen records by a basis/value selector.

recommend_positions.description: Recommend empty positions for new tubes.

takeout.description: Record takeout for one or more tubes in one call.

rollback.description: Rollback inventory YAML to a backup snapshot using explicit backup_path from list_audit_timeline.
rollback.notes: Always provide explicit backup_path selected from action=backup rows in list_audit_timeline.

search_records.description: Search inventory records with optional query and structured filters; use status=all|active|inactive and sort_by/sort_order (default: frozen_at desc, nulls last). 按可选 query 与结构化条件搜索库存记录；使用 status=all|active|inactive 与 sort_by/sort_order（默认 frozen_at desc，空值置后）。

validation.doesNotMatchAllowedSchema: {label} does not match any allowed schema
